context: Tests whether the agent catches the coordinator parent refresh and state synchronization details for a UIViewRepresentable UIKit wrapper.

checklist.name: Coordinator parent refresh
checklist.description: States that SwiftUI does not automatically update a coordinator's stored parent value and shows or recommends assigning context.coordinator.parent = self in updateUIView.

checklist.name: Delegate placement
checklist.description: Keeps UISearchBar delegate assignment in makeUIView instead of moving it to updateUIView.

checklist.name: Guarded UIKit update
checklist.description: Keeps or recommends guarding uiView.text writes so updateUIView does not cause redundant updates or delegate loops.

checklist.name: UIKit-to-SwiftUI binding sync
checklist.description: Adds or recommends UISearchBarDelegate text-change handling that writes user edits back into the SwiftUI binding.

checklist.name: Stale copied state explanation
checklist.description: Explains that the coordinator stores a copy of the representable and that copied closures or non-binding state can become stale without refresh, while bindings remain connected to their storage.

checklist.name: Scoped interop answer
checklist.description: Keeps the answer focused on representable lifecycle and coordinator communication, without broad unrelated UIKit or SwiftUI architecture work.
